# Anduril Showcases Advanced Edge Computing and Communications Capabilities at USMC Steel Knight Exercise

Anduril integrated its Menace Family of Systems (FoS) — a suite of edge computing and communications solutions — during the U.S. Marine Corps' Steel Knight exercise.
